overall.description: A static shot of a grand Gothic fireplace flanked by two large stone lion statues in a medieval castle interior, with a warm fire burning steadily in the hearth. The footage appears to be from a video game engine, showcasing detailed stone architecture and atmospheric firelight.

segments.scene_description: A completely stationary view of a grand Gothic fireplace in a medieval castle interior, flanked by two imposing stone lion statues. The fire burns steadily in the hearth, casting warm flickering light on the carved stone mantelpiece and marble floor, while an arched doorway is visible to the right and a wall sconce to the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, atmospheric gaze upon a grand Gothic fireplace that anchors a medieval castle interior. It begins with a stationary view of the hearth, where a steady fire casts warm, flickering light across the carved stone mantelpiece and polished marble floor. The composition remains fixed, emphasizing the symmetry of two imposing stone lion statues that flank the fireplace. The scene holds this stillness, allowing the play of light to shift subtly across the surrounding architecture, including a wall sconce to the left and an arched doorway to the right.
